title: More Tools For Ores
description: Adds new tools and armor for vanilla minecraft ores.
body:
Adds new tools and armor for vanilla ores.

# **FEATURES**

_· Emerald tools_

_· Emerald armor_

_· Copper tools_

_· Copper armor_

_· Oxidized copper armor_

_· Amethyst tools_

_· Amethyst armor_

_· Redstone tools_

_· Redstone armor_

_· Coal tools_

_· Coal armor_

## **RECIPES**

### TOOLS:


**Emerald Sword:**

![Emerald Sword Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c178603e692b9986bcffa8e330708309207d83d.png)

**Emerald Pickaxe:**

![Emerald Pickaxe Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7939d727b80e97481a769ca22197e9f0ef0d092.png)

**Emerald Axe:**

![Emerald Axe Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28a41ca0ecda0061350c50d7bd4bec3e458b027e.png)

**Emerald Shovel:**

![Emerald Shovel Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23a594f032f459a1c7b4a31c1f588c43a2c8edcc.png)

**Emerald Hoe:**

![Emerald Hoe Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af9130986449b2f45f73b1c4c71b1e487a4f263f.png)

And the same for all the other tools, but just changing the material.

**For copper tools:** Copper

**For amethyst tools:** Amethyst Shards

**For redstone tools:** Redstone Dust

**For coal tools:** Coal

### ARMOR:

Emerald Helmet:

![Emerald Helmet Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b77ab2bda2123cd3039facc8567b9cd6b904d13.png)

Emerald Chestplate:

![Emerald Chestplate Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/004b9ec914a8958ee0f27eb7955d09e008779d1f.png)

Emerald Leggings:

![Emerald Leggings Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d90058bb274a4ec582f723284b45450eea04f75a.png)

Emerald Boots:

![Emerald Boots Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb3d84e3582ab8c86215ae0923b265b27ccd86d6.png)

And the same for all the other armors, but just changing the material.

**For copper armor:** Copper

**For amethyst armor:** Amethyst Shards

**For redstone armor:** Redstone Dust

**For coal armor:** Coal
